queries.question: Which airline uses the plane PlaneModel3 and what are the linear dimensions of that plane?
queries.sql: select A.name, P.linear_dimensions from Airlines A inner join Planes P on P.airline_id = A.id where P.model = 'PlaneModel3'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?linear_dimensions WHERE {
  ?a a :Airlines .
  ?p a :Planes .
  ?p p:hasAirlines ?a .
  ?a p:name ?name .
  ?p p:linear_dimensions ?linear_dimensions .
  ?p p:model ?model_f .
  FILTER(STR(?model_f) = "PlaneModel3")
}

queries.question: What is the weight restriction for the plane departing the runway with length 5000 at 11:00 on the 4th January?
queries.sql: select P.weight_restriction from Planes P inner join Flights F on P.model = F.plane_model inner join Runways R on R.id = F.runway_id where R.length = 5000 and F.departure_time = '2022-01-04 11:00:00'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?weight_restriction WHERE {
  ?p a :Planes .
  ?f a :Flights .
  ?p p:model ?model_l .
  ?f p:plane_model ?plane_model_r .
  ?r a :Runways .
  ?f p:hasRunways ?r .
  ?p p:weight_restriction ?weight_restriction .
  ?r p:length ?length_f .
  ?f p:departure_time ?departure_time_f .
  FILTER(STR(?model_l) = STR(?plane_model_r))
  FILTER((STR(?length_f) = "5000" || STR(?length_f) = "5000.0"))
  FILTER(STR(?departure_time_f) = "2022-01-04 11:00:00")
}

queries.question: What is the size limit for the plane departing from the runway with length 5000 at 11:00 on the 4th of January?
queries.sql: select P.linear_dimensions, weight_restriction from Planes P inner join Flights F on P.model = F.plane_model inner join Runways R on R.id = F.runway_id where R.length = 5000 and F.departure_time = '2022-01-04 11:00:00'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?linear_dimensions ?weight_restriction WHERE {
  ?p a :Planes .
  ?f a :Flights .
  ?p p:model ?model_l .
  ?f p:plane_model ?plane_model_r .
  ?r a :Runways .
  ?f p:hasRunways ?r .
  ?p p:linear_dimensions ?linear_dimensions .
  ?p p:weight_restriction ?weight_restriction .
  ?r p:length ?length_f .
  ?f p:departure_time ?departure_time_f .
  FILTER(STR(?model_l) = STR(?plane_model_r))
  FILTER((STR(?length_f) = "5000" || STR(?length_f) = "5000.0"))
  FILTER(STR(?departure_time_f) = "2022-01-04 11:00:00")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which airline uses the plane PlaneModel3 and what are the corresponding size limits?

} }
  full: { SELECT ?linear_dimensions ?weight_restriction WHERE {

  ?p p:model ?model_l .
  ?f p:plane_model ?plane_model_r .
